requirements: Widget supports two states: collapsed and expanded (toggle via IconButton)
Collapsed state: Pill visualization with colored blocks proportional to duration
Expanded state: Vertical ListView with Cards for each section
Section model includes: name, notes, duration (int, in phrases)
EditSectionDialog includes duration field with helper buttons (1, 2, 3, 4)
Auto-Generate creates random structure with 3-7 sections and random durations (1-4)
Vertical ReorderableListView for drag-and-drop in expanded state
Colors for pill blocks are hash-based from section name
Pill block width is proportional to duration/totalDuration
Export structure as JSON to console
Delete section via icon button or swipe
Validation: section name cannot be empty

files.name: lib/models/section.dart
files.description: Section model with name, notes, duration fields

files.name: lib/widgets/section_card.dart
files.description: Card widget for expanded state section item

files.name: lib/widgets/edit_section_dialog.dart
files.description: Dialog for editing section with duration helpers

files.name: test/widget_test.dart
files.description: Widget tests for states, duration, and interactions

milestones: Update Section model with duration field
